name: ActivTrak
description: Monitor ActivTrak workforce analytics platform for user activity monitoring, alerting, and agent deployment compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to ActivTrak at https://app.activtrak.com
2. Navigate to API & Integrations > API Keys
3. Click 'Create API Key' and follow the prompts
4. Copy the API key (it can only be viewed once)
5. Determine your region from your ActivTrak login URL
6. Enter the API key and region below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Generate at ActivTrak > API & Integrations > API Keys. Requires Admin role.

credentialFields.label: API Region
credentialFields.helpText: Your ActivTrak API base domain. US: api.activtrak.com, EU: api-eu.activtrak.com, UK: api-uk.activtrak.com, AU: api-au.activtrak.com, CA: api-ca.activtrak.com

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies ActivTrak activity monitoring is active by checking for recent activity data collected by deployed agents

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all ActivTrak console users (consumers) with their roles and group access permissions

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Lists all monitored devices (user agents/clients) registered in ActivTrak
